com.mentor.chs.plugin

Interface IXCurrentContext

  • All Superinterfaces:
    IXBaseCurrentContext
    All Known Subinterfaces:
    IXApplicationContext

    @NotToBeImplemented
public interface IXCurrentContext
extends IXBaseCurrentContext
    Single Class that provides contextual information to actions/plugins. This information may change between invocations.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods Deprecated Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      IXBuildList getActiveBuildList()
      Returns the active build list for the application.
      IXScenario getActiveScenarioForDesign(IXDesign design)
      Returns the active scenario in which design is opened, generally for Integrator design
      IXBridgeContext getBridgeContext()
      Returns the bridge context for the application.
      IXDesign getCurrentDesign()
      Return the current design the application is working on.
      IXDiagram getCurrentDiagram()
      Return the current diagram the application is working on.
      IXProject getCurrentProject()
      Return the current project the application is working on.
      IXSBOM getCurrentSBOM()
      Retrieves the current SBOM open in the active application.
      java.util.Set<? extends IXDiagram> getOpenDiagrams()
      Return the set of IXDiagram that are currently opened in the application and belongs to the current project.
      java.util.Set<IXObject> getSelectedObjects()
      Deprecated. 
      Use getSelectedObjects(Class<O> filterClass) which is a more advanced version.

      • Methods inherited from interface com.mentor.chs.plugin.IXBaseCurrentContext

        getActiveLanguage, getCurrentUser, getSelectedObjects

    • Method Detail

      • getCurrentProject

        IXProject getCurrentProject()

        Return the current project the application is working on. Note that an application may have several projects open. This method will return the project that currently has focus.

        Returns:
        the current project, will return 'null' if no project present or has focus.

      • getCurrentDesign

        IXDesign getCurrentDesign()

        Return the current design the application is working on. Note that an application may have several designs open. This method will return the design that currently has focus.

        Returns:
        the current design, will return 'null' if no design present or has focus.

      • getCurrentDiagram

        IXDiagram getCurrentDiagram()

        Return the current diagram the application is working on. Note that an application may have several diagrams open. This method will return the diagram that currently has focus.

        Returns:
        the current diagram, will return 'null' if no diagram present or has focus.

      • getSelectedObjects

        java.util.Set<IXObject> getSelectedObjects()
        Deprecated. Use getSelectedObjects(Class<O> filterClass) which is a more advanced version.

        Return the set of IXObjects that are currently selected on the diagram. This method will never return null, but will return an empty set if no objects are selected.

        Returns:
        an unmodifiable set of selected objects.
        Throws:
        java.lang.UnsupportedOperationException - - if an attempt is made to modify the returned set.

      • getOpenDiagrams

        java.util.Set<? extends IXDiagram> getOpenDiagrams()

        Return the set of IXDiagram that are currently opened in the application and belongs to the current project. This method will never return null, but will return an empty set if no diagrams are open.

        Returns:
        an unmodifiable set of diagram.
        Throws:
        java.lang.UnsupportedOperationException - - if an attempt is made to modify the returned set.

      • getActiveBuildList

        IXBuildList getActiveBuildList()
        Returns the active build list for the application.
        Returns:
        active build list object if applicable, else null.

      • getBridgeContext

        IXBridgeContext getBridgeContext()
        Returns the bridge context for the application. This is applicable for Bridges plugins only
        Returns:
        bridge context if applicable, else null.

      • getActiveScenarioForDesign

        IXScenario getActiveScenarioForDesign(IXDesign design)
        Returns the active scenario in which design is opened, generally for Integrator design
        Parameters:
        design - is the design for which scenario is retrieved
        Returns:
        Scenario if any exist, NULL otherwise

      • getCurrentSBOM

        IXSBOM getCurrentSBOM()
        Retrieves the current SBOM open in the active application. If there is no open SBOM in the active application, null is returned.
        Returns:
        The current SBOM or null
